body:
APPROVE
Clean, minimal implementation: one new request field, one ORed wiring line, and three test cases (the two required plus a sensible default-preset negative control) that distinguish the planning turn from the main-loop turn by tool-set length and prompt content. Field doc comment correctly notes the "agent" harness scope and the benchmark auto-enable behavior.
